questions.question: Graph the solution to the inequality $x + 2 \leq 7$ on a number line.
A recipe for making cookies requires $\frac{3}{4}$ cup of sugar per batch. If you want to make at least 5 batches, how much sugar will you need in total?
Write the solution to the inequality $x - 3 > 2$ in interval notation.
A construction project requires that the height of the building be at least $50$ meters. If the current height is $40$ meters, what is the minimum amount that needs to be added?
The length of a room is at most $15$ meters. If the width of the room is $8$ meters, what is the maximum area of the room?
A water tank can hold at most $1000$ liters of water. If $200$ liters of water are already in the tank, what is the maximum amount of water that can still be added?

A bakery sells a total of $250$ loaves of bread per day. They sell a combination of whole wheat and white bread. If they sell at least $30$ more whole wheat loaves than white bread loaves, and they sell at most $150$ white bread loaves, find the range of the number of whole wheat loaves they can sell. Show your work and explain your reasoning.

A builder is constructing a building with a triangular roof. The length of the base of the roof is at least $10$ meters, and the height of the roof is at most $15$ meters. If the area of the roof is $> 50$ square meters, find the range of possible values for the base and height of the roof. Use inequalities to represent your solutions and graph them on a coordinate plane.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Encourage students to read the questions carefully and identify the key elements of the inequality.
Tip 2: Remind students to check their work and verify their solutions.
Tip 3: Emphasize the importance of using proper notation and formatting when writing solutions in interval notation.
